name: Bloomin' Sauce and Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Picante sauce (Pace medium or hot)
8 oz Cream cheese (room temperature so it is soft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to a container and place in the refrigerator.
3. Allow the sauce to thicken for at least 24 hours before serving.
